items.title_en: Oil prices jump 4% as Rubio says Iran 'not serious' about peace talks
items.title_zh: 卢比奥称伊朗“不认真”对待和谈 油价上涨 4%
items.desc_en: Oil prices rose as hopes for a ceasefire in the Middle East faded.
items.desc_zh: 随着中东停火希望破灭，油价上涨。

items.title_en: Citizens United provision allowing foreign campaign contributions draws Democratic bill
items.title_zh: 公民联合组织允许外国竞选捐款的条款吸引了民主党法案
items.desc_en: Rep. Jamie Raskin, D-Md., and Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse, D-R.I., want to establish foreign ownership thresholds for companies that spend on campaigns.
items.desc_zh: 马里兰州民主党众议员杰米·拉斯金 (Jamie Raskin) 和罗德岛州民主党参议员谢尔登·怀特豪斯 (Sheldon Whitehouse) 希望为竞选资金的公司设立外资所有权门槛。

items.title_en: Kalshi launches election hub for prediction markets ahead of midterms
items.title_zh: 卡尔希在中期选举前推出预测市场选举中心
items.desc_en: The company said the page gives viewers of its event contracts a central place to see speculators' outlook for the midterm elections.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，该页面为其活动合约的查看者提供了一个了解投机者对中期选举前景的中心位置。

items.title_en: Police station opens at Hitler's birthplace in bid to rid site of Nazi link
items.title_zh: 希特勒出生地设立警察局，以消除与纳粹的联系
items.desc_en: The opening follows years of controversy about what to do with the 17th-Century former inn, where the Nazi dictator was born.
items.desc_zh: 多年来，关于如何处理纳粹独裁者出生的 17 世纪前旅馆的争议一直存在。

items.title_zh: 官员称，俄罗斯在线零售商Wildberry的更多仓库受到乌克兰袭击

items.desc_zh: 该术语由气象局于 4 月份引入，用于描述气温达到 40 摄氏度的日子。

items.title_zh: 印度隧道塌陷造成12名工人死亡

items.desc_zh: 救援行动仍在进行中，但危险的条件阻碍了救援仍在屋内的人员的工作。

items.title_zh: 蕾蓓尔·威尔逊 (Rebel Wilson) 在自己电影中的女演员提起的诽谤案中被洗清

items.title_en: Meet the women breaking world records in lumberjack sports
items.title_zh: 认识在伐木工运动中打破世界纪录的女性

items.desc_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 找出是什么推动这项运动越来越受女性欢迎，以及如何才能成为最好的运动。

items.title_en: Trump's push for American-made AI chips hits TSMC's margins
items.title_zh: 特朗普推动美国制造的人工智能芯片打击台积电的利润
items.desc_en: The Taiwan-based chipmaker has announced $200 billion in investment into U.S. manufacturing since Trump returned to power in 2025.
items.desc_zh: 自特朗普 2025 年重新掌权以来，这家台湾芯片制造商已宣布对美国制造业投资 2000 亿美元。

items.title_en: France passes law banning under-15s from social media
items.title_zh: 法国通过法律禁止15岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
items.desc_en: The law will require social media platforms in France to verify all users age from January.
items.desc_zh: 该法律将要求法国的社交媒体平台从一月份起验证所有用户的年龄。

items.title_en: Michelin-starred restaurateur faces jail for using ants as dessert garnish
items.title_zh: 米其林星级餐厅老板因使用蚂蚁作为甜点装饰而面临牢狱之灾
items.desc_en: Officials say the restaurant in South Korea used some 49,000 ants in various dishes over four years.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，这家韩国餐厅四年来在各种菜肴中使用了约 49,000 只蚂蚁。

items.title_en: US renews strikes on Iran as Trump threatens to attack underground nuclear site
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁攻击地下核设施，美国再次对伊朗发动打击
items.desc_en: The US president's threat to target a key Iranian nuclear site came ahead of the 11th consecutive night of attacks.
items.desc_zh: 在连续 11 晚发生袭击之前，美国总统威胁要袭击伊朗的一个重要核设施。

items.title_en: Gruesome images in D4vd hearing are 'worst nightmare' for teen girl's family
items.title_zh: D4vd 听证会上的可怕图像对少女的家人来说是“最糟糕的噩梦”
items.desc_en: The court hears the singer ordered a body bag, chainsaws and an inflatable pool to dispose of the teen's body.
items.desc_zh: 法庭获悉，这位歌手订购了一个裹尸袋、电锯和一个充气水池来处理青少年的尸体。

items.title_en: These Japanese AI winners don’t make chips. They make toilets, glass fiber and seasoning
items.title_zh: 这些日本人工智能赢家并不生产芯片。他们制造厕所、玻璃纤维和调味料
items.desc_en: A toilet maker, a glass fiber manufacturer and the maker of MSG have in Japan have become major beneficiaries of the AI boom.
items.desc_zh: 日本的马桶制造商、玻璃纤维制造商和味精制造商已成为人工智能热潮的主要受益者。

items.title_en: Iran war has cost US $37.5bn so far, Hegseth says, as Pentagon seeks billions more
items.title_zh: 赫格斯表示，伊朗战争迄今已造成 375 亿美元损失，五角大楼正在寻求数十亿美元的额外援助
items.desc_en: The hearing was disrupted by protests and a shouting match as Hegseth testified at a pivotal time in the war.
items.desc_zh: 赫格斯在战争的关键时刻作证时，听证会因抗议和争吵而中断。

items.title_en: $100M New Jersey deli fraudster James Patten sentenced to 21 months in prison
items.title_zh: 价值 1 亿美元的新泽西熟食店诈骗犯 James Patten 被判处 21 个月监禁
items.desc_en: The notorious New Jersey deli fraud case led to losses of more than $5 million for victims that included two U.S. universities.
items.desc_zh: 臭名昭著的新泽西州熟食店欺诈案给受害者造成了超过 500 万美元的损失，其中包括两所美国大学。

items.desc_zh: 奥索夫与赫格赛斯就伊朗战争中“压倒性胜利”的说法发生争执

items.title_en: Trump plans steep tariffs on generic drugs starting in 2028 to spur U.S. production
items.title_zh: 特朗普计划从 2028 年开始对仿制药征收高额关税，以刺激美国生产
items.desc_en: The phased schedule is intended to push generic drugmakers to move production onshore.
items.desc_zh: 该分阶段计划旨在推动仿制药制造商将生产转移到境内。

items.title_en: Nike to cut off thousands of online distributors in China, restructure digital footprint
items.title_zh: 耐克将切断中国数千家在线分销商，重组数字足迹
items.desc_en: Nike is streamlining its online business in China as the company looks to stabilize pricing and branding and get back to growth.
items.desc_zh: 耐克正在精简其在中国的在线业务，以稳定定价和品牌并恢复增长。

items.title_en: Prediction markets and their opponents are spending more to influence Congress in 2026
items.title_zh: 预测市场及其对手将花费更多资金来影响 2026 年国会
items.desc_en: Kalshi and groups representing the casino and gaming industry and online sports betting apps, all have boosted their lobbying spending in 2026.
items.desc_zh: Kalshi 以及代表赌场和游戏行业以及在线体育博彩应用程序的团体都在 2026 年增加了游说支出。

items.title_en: The Fed rang the alarm about Anthropic's Mythos AI model — but had to go months without it
items.title_zh: 美联储对 Anthropic 的 Mythos AI 模型敲响了警钟，但不得不几个月没有使用它
items.desc_en: The central bank didn't have access to Claude Mythos Preview as of mid-July, even as other institutions were racing to patch their vulnerabilities.
items.desc_zh: 截至 7 月中旬，央行还无法访问 Claude Mythos Preview，尽管其他机构正在竞相修补其漏洞。

items.title_en: Tokyo urges men to wear shorts to work, but some women say it's 'leg hair harassment'
items.title_zh: 东京敦促男性穿短裤上班，但一些女性称这是“腿毛骚扰”
items.desc_en: The Tokyo Metropolitan Government wants workers to ditch the suit and tie for t-shirts, trainers - and shorts.
items.desc_zh: 东京都政府希望工人们抛弃西装和领带，改穿 T 恤、运动鞋和短裤。

items.title_en: OpenAI appoints two new members to board of directors
items.title_zh: OpenAI 任命两名新董事会成员
items.desc_en: OpenAI appointed longtime financial executives David Vélez and Robin Vince to its nonprofit and for-profit boards.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 任命长期担任财务主管的 David Vélez 和 Robin Vince 为其非营利和营利性董事会成员。

items.title_en: SpaceX snaps 7-day losing streak, sets earnings date that triggers first big share unlock
items.title_zh: SpaceX结束7连跌，确定财报日期，触发首次大额解锁
items.desc_en: SpaceX's stock gained on Tuesday and looked to snap a seven-day losing streak after announcing Aug. 4 as its maiden earnings report
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 的股价周二上涨，并有望结束 8 月 4 日发布的首份财报后连续 7 天的跌势

items.title_en: The sell-off in Korean stocks may soon subside. That could be good news for U.S. markets
items.title_zh: 韩国股市的抛售可能很快就会平息。这对美国市场来说可能是个好消息
items.desc_en: South Korea's stock market could be turning around — and some investors expect its U.S. counterpart won't be far behind.
items.desc_zh: 韩国股市可能会出现好转，一些投资者预计美国股市也不会落后太多。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Dogs have a great sense of smell. Now machines are being trained to sniff out odours.
items.desc_zh: 狗有很强的嗅觉。现在机器正在接受训练来嗅出气味。

items.title_en: Zelensky sacks Ukraine's top army commander after days of protests
items.title_zh: 经过数天的抗议后，泽伦斯基解雇了乌克兰最高陆军司令
items.desc_en: Oleksandr Syrskyi is dismissed after days of unrest over the removal of popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.
items.desc_zh: 亚历山大·西尔斯基 (Oleksandr Syrskyi) 在因受欢迎的国防部长米哈伊洛·费多罗夫 (Mykhailo Fedorov) 免职而引发数天骚乱后被解雇。

items.title_en: Ready for takeoff: This stock’s next growth runway is securing identity in an AI age
items.title_zh: 准备起飞：这只股票的下一个增长跑道是在人工智能时代确保身份

items.desc_zh: 富有弹性的机场特许经营权已成为客户获取引擎，为该股票更广泛的身份平台提供动力，并赋予其竞争优势。

items.desc_zh: 随着与美国的冲突持续，伊朗领导人面临的所有选择都没有提供明确的胜利之路。

items.title_en: Sen. Darline Graham says she’s running for a full 6-year term after Trump urged her to jump into the race - NBC News
items.title_zh: 参议员达林·格雷厄姆 (Darline Graham) 表示，在特朗普敦促她参加竞选后，她将竞选完整的 6 年任期 - NBC 新闻
items.desc_en: Sen. Darline Graham says she’s running for a full 6-year term after Trump urged her to jump into the race  NBC NewsOpinion | Darline Graham’s appointment belongs to a pattern — with one difference  Th
items.desc_zh: 参议员达林·格雷厄姆 (Darline Graham) 表示，在特朗普敦促她参加竞选后，她将竞选完整的 6 年任期达林·格雷厄姆 (Darline Graham) 的任命属于一种模式——但有一点不同

items.title_en: Thousands of websites taken down for illegal World Cup streams
items.title_zh: 数千个因非法世界杯直播而被关闭的网站
items.desc_en: More than 1,000 illegal streaming sites were shut down in the US during the tournament, with a similar amount blocked in Colombia.
items.desc_zh: 比赛期间，美国关闭了 1,000 多个非法流媒体网站，哥伦比亚也屏蔽了类似数量的网站。

items.title_en: Ofcom unable to take further legal action against suicide forum
items.title_zh: Ofcom 无法对自杀论坛采取进一步的法律行动
items.desc_en: The regulator said it had "no further legal routes available" under the Online Safety Act.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，根据《在线安全法》，“没有其他可用的合法途径”。

items.title_en: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for allowing sale of illegal goods
items.title_zh: 全球速卖通因允许销售非法商品而被欧盟罚款创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元
items.desc_en: The Chinese retailer allowed unsafe toys and counterfeit clothes to be sold on its site, says the EU.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟表示，这家中国零售商允许在其网站上销售不安全的玩具和假冒服装。

items.title_zh: 中国的Moonshot AI声称Kimi K3可以与OpenAI和Anthropic相媲美

items.desc_zh: 该公司推出了一个大规模的新人工智能模型，据称可以与美国顶尖公司抗衡。

items.desc_zh: 特朗普媒体正在为华尔街交易员推出快速、付费的社交帖子。

items.title_en: Teen hackers who live streamed cyber-attack on TfL jailed
items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.title_en: SpaceX share price drops below stock market debut
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价跌破上市首日价
items.desc_en: Share trading in Elon Musk’s rocket company has been volatile since it went public a month ago.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克的火箭公司自一个月前上市以来，其股票交易一直波动较大。

items.title_en: Midnight social media curfew proposed for UK teens aged 16 and 17
items.title_zh: 英国提议对 16 岁和 17 岁青少年实行午夜社交媒体宵禁
items.desc_en: The government says it will improve teenagers' lives but campaigners call it a "missed opportunity".
items.desc_zh: 政府表示这将改善青少年的生活，但活动人士称这是“错失的机会”。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Surgeons remotely control two human-like robots in an operating theatre.
items.desc_zh: 外科医生在手术室中远程控制两个类人机器人。

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。
